name: DSG SkillGate
description: Open-source GitHub skill discovery, inspection, verification, locking, and gated execution.

buildSkillDraft: code execution + external write -> high risk
org/repo names with dots and uppercase -> lowercase slug
draftedAt is a valid ISO timestamp
verifySkill: hardcoded secrets -> blocked, HARDCODED_SECRET_DETECTED (overrides other flags)
multiple soft flags -> all reasons accumulated
lockSkill: buildLockEntry: registeredAt is valid ISO timestamp
registerSkillToLock: writes skill to temp-dir lock, returns updated lock
registerSkillToLock: blocked skill written with blocked status
registerSkillToLock: persisted lock can be re-read with correct data
runSkillAction: unknown skillId -> blocked, SKILL_NOT_REGISTERED, governed gate NOT called
blocked registry entry -> blocked, SKILL_BLOCKED_IN_REGISTRY, governed gate NOT called
needs_approval entry -> review, governed gate NOT called
needs_review entry -> review, governed gate NOT called
verified + gate blocks -> ok:false, gateReason contains blocked reason
args.skillId, args.sourceUrl, evidence skill_hash: passed to governed gate
pipeline: Step 2: verifySkill returns verified for clean inspection
Step 3: buildLockEntry has deterministic hash pinned to commit
Step 4: risky repo (secrets+exec+write) -> blocked before lock
Step 5: same input always produces same hash (Z3 determinism invariant)

runGate.goal: Summarize recent commits in this repository
runGate.note: Gate ALLOW. Live execution requires a connected runtime sandbox.

lastVerifiedBy: Claude Code session — npm test (247 passed / 29 files, 0 failures)
notes: 2026-05-25: 247 tests / 29 files — +20 tests (agent-code-evolution, agent-deploy-monitor, agent-browser-research) via PR #98.
lastVerified reflects CI run on main after PR #93 merged.
Lock tests use real temp directories — no fs mocking. Failures reflect actual filesystem behavior.
Run gate tests assert that blocked/needs_review/needs_approval paths never call prepareGovernedToolRequest.
Pipeline test is fully offline — no GitHub API calls made.
